Urban Climate Study / Report 06Motion · evidence reader
FIELD EVIDENCE / 42 SITES

Shade extends the useful life of a public place.

Across 42 monitored courtyards, tree shade reduced peak surface temperature by 11.8°C, while comfortable seating use lasted 37 minutes longer.

000%
WHEEL / DRAG TO READ
ARROWS TO REVIEW · END FOR CONCLUSION
